description: A deterministic ledger for storing, updating, and retrieving structured memory entries across autonomous agents.

memory_entry.description: A structured memory object containing key, value, timestamp, and metadata.

operation.description: One of: write, update, delete, retrieve.

query.description: Criteria for retrieving or modifying memory entries.

workflow.action: Ensure the requested operation is allowed and properly formatted.
Write, update, delete, or retrieve memory entries deterministically.
Return a machine-readable ledger response with status and data.
